items.description: Nvidia To Supply 120,000 GPUs As UK, US Strike Historic AI Investment Deal

items.description: The stock bulls get ready for a rate cut.

items.title: RightRev Expands Its Partnership with Salesforce to Deliver Revenue Recognition for Revenue Cloud Advanced
items.description: Revenue recognition automation leader RightRev has deepened its strategic Salesforce partnership by delivering an enhanced solution specifically designed for Revenue Cloud Advanced (RCA) and Revenue Cloud Billing (RCB). The RightRev offering for Salesforce provides a hyper-scale solution to automate all monetization models across any transaction volume.

items.title: The UK companies partnering with US big tech
items.description: US tech giants have committed to invest billions in the UK, as the two countries unveiled a landmark tech deal.

items.title: Trump's UK visit: US Big Tech to invest billions in UK's AI
items.description: President Trump is visiting the UK to meet with Prime Minister Keir Starmer on Thursday, accompanied by several Big Tech CEOs. This comes as names like Microsoft (MSFT), Google (GOOG, GOOGL), Nvidia (NVDA), Salesforce (CRM), OpenAI (OPAI.PVT), and GSK (GSK) pledged $42.3 billion worth of artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure investments in the UK as part of the "Tech Prosperity Deal." Yahoo Finance anchor Ramzan Karmali joins Morning Brief with Julie Hyman to discuss the details. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Morning Brief.
